title: The Accra Freedom Grid
subtitle: Gulf of Guinea coast — West (local hubs) to East (colonial citadels)
description: The map stretches along the coast from dense civilian resistance in the west to militarized British administrative fortresses in the east. Level flow follows historical march routes and post-Crossroads riot sectors.

geography.directionNote: Coastal axis runs west (James Town / Ussher) → east (Victoriaborg / Osu Castle)

sectors.label: James Town & Ussher Town
sectors.subtitle: The Slums
sectors.summary: Yaw's motor yard, drainage alleys, and the cell's last stand — civilian-heavy resistance heartland.

sectors.label: Salaga & Makola Markets
sectors.subtitle: Boycott & Riot Square
sectors.summary: AWAM boycott ground zero — fish tables, market stalls, Kaneshie warehouse fires. Hit monopoly stores, protect Auntie Esi.

sectors.label: Victoriaborg
sectors.subtitle: Administrative Zone
sectors.summary: Colonial Secretariat, Radio Hill intercepts, Castle courier routes — Kwesi's registry desk targets.

sectors.label: Christiansborg Crossroads
sectors.subtitle: The Checkpoint
sectors.summary: Peaceful march terminus — Christ Church to coast road. Imray's constables; martyrs fall; canon locked.

routes.label: Winneba / Rowe Road Connection
routes.summary: Smuggled intel and night runners link the slums to the administrative quarter.

routes.label: The March Route
routes.summary: Unarmed veterans column — Christ Church, coast road, Crossroads gate. Petitions, not rifles.

stronghold.label: Osu Castle
stronghold.subtitle: The Seat — Final Stronghold
stronghold.summary: Governor Creasy's seat at Christiansborg. The petition never arrives — but the Watson Commission will.

nodes.label: Boycott & Mobilization
nodes.summary: Veterans gather evidence; AWAM boycott; Asare trust builds.

nodes.label: The Peaceful March
nodes.summary: Unarmed column along the coast road toward Osu Castle.

nodes.label: The Crossroads Massacre
nodes.summary: Imray's constables; three martyrs fall — canon locked.

nodes.label: Salaga & Makola Uprising
nodes.summary: Kojo & Araba — AWAM targets, innocent stalls protected.

nodes.label: Kaneshie Lines
nodes.summary: First riot fires; Kofi rescued; boycott evidence.

nodes.label: Victoriaborg Infiltration
nodes.summary: Kwesi steals patrol rosters via Rowe Road intel corridor.

nodes.label: Ussher Yard Stand
nodes.summary: Hold the yard; all four survive; Watson Commission arc.
